# Project-level configuration.
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.14)
project(proxy_client_ui LANGUAGES CXX)

# The name of the executable created for the application. Change this to change
# the on-disk name of your application.
set(BINARY_NAME "proxy_client_ui")

# Explicitly opt in to modern CMake behaviors to avoid warnings with recent
# versions of CMake.
cmake_policy(SET CMP0063 NEW)

# Define build configuration.
set(CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE Release)

# Load distributed Flutter build configuration.
# This file is generated by the Flutter tooling at build time and should not
# be checked into version management.
include(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/flutter/ephemeral/flutter_generated.cmake OPTIONAL)

# Define the application target. The application target is built by the
# runner CMakeLists.txt, which is included below.
#
# When adding new source files to the application, they should be added
# in the runner CMakeLists.txt, not here.
add_subdirectory("runner")

# Include Flutter build configuration.
include(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/flutter/ephemeral/flutter_generated.cmake OPTIONAL)
